expectations.text: tests/ contains individual test files for each core module
expectations.evidence: 16 top-level test files: executor_test.go, client_test.go, context_test.go, module_test.go, config_test.go, errors_test.go, acl_test.go, approval_test.go, async_task_test.go, bindings_test.go, cancel_test.go, decorator_test.go, extensions_test.go, trace_context_test.go, version_test.go, plus helpers_test.go

expectations.text: tests/ includes a shared fixtures/helper file
expectations.evidence: helpers_test.go provides newMockExecutor(), sampleContext(), sampleModuleConfig() factory functions

expectations.text: tests/ has subdirectories: integration/, registry/, schema/, observability/
expectations.evidence: All 4 present plus additional: middleware/ (5 tests), events/ (2 tests), sysmodules/ (5 tests), integration/ (10 tests), conformance/ (1 test), examples/ (1 test)

expectations.text: Test stubs contain failing assertions using Go convention
expectations.evidence: Tests use t.Fatal("not implemented") pattern, shown in executor_test.go example code
examples/ directory with 8 runnable Go files + 1 YAML binding config
examples/simple_client.go present with complete runnable code: NewAPCore(), Register(), Call(), error handling, fmt.Printf

expectations.text: examples/ contains modules/ with greet, get_user, send_email
expectations.evidence: examples/modules/ contains greet.go, get_user.go, send_email.go, plus decorated_add.go (from reference sync)
